# **Get up to a $15,000 credit limit on an unsecured credit card**

As a newcomer, choose from a variety of credit cards and start building your credit history in Canada with the Scotiabank _StartRight®_ Program† – even without a credit history§.

[Explore our cardsand apply for a credit card online](https://startright.scotiabank.com/ca/en/credit-cards.html#seecards)

Increase your credit limit

Nova Credit lets you use your credit history from back home to help you settle in faster. Take advantage of the credit score you built in your home country to access a higher credit limit on your Scotiabank credit card††.

[Get a higher credit limit](https://startright.scotiabank.com/ca/en/higher-credit-limit-for-newcomers-to-canada.html)

## **Earn rewards with our credit cards**

Earn rewards with specific credit cards for everyday purchases in Canada. Whether it be in points, miles or cash back, our credit cards offer many benefits for everyday spending.

![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/request-money/request-money-colour.svg)

**Cash back**

Earn cash back rewards on everyday purchases. Get cash deposited directly into your account.

![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/rewards/rewards-colour.svg)

**Lifestyle**

As a Scene+ member, earn and redeem points for travel, shopping, dining and more.

## Build your credit history faster

- ![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/shopping-bags/shopping-bags-colour.svg)


Get a credit card and use it on a regular basis.

- ![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/recurring-fee/recurring-fee-colour.svg)


Always pay your bills on time.

- ![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/quick-balance/quick-balance-colour.svg)


Pay your bills off in full whenever possible.

- ![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/debit-card/debit-card-colour.svg)


Limit yourself to just one or two credit cards.

- ![](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/credit-score/credit-score-colour.svg)


Know your credit score.


### Choose the card that's right for you

[Help me choose](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/loans-lines/help-me-choose-master.html) [Calculate and save](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/credit-cards/compare-credit-card-rewards.html)

![A couple stands on a bridge, holding glasses of orange juice, enjoying a refreshing drink together.](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/startright/images/credit-card-tiles-686x386.jpg)

### **Why do I need to build my credit history in Canada?**

When you apply for credit in Canada, lenders will normally check your credit history to help with their decision. Building good credit could help you save money on interest rates and get approved more easily for things like cell phones, lines of credit and car loans.

[Read more about building credit history in Canada](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/advice-plus/features/posts.how-to-increase-your-credit-score.html)

![A man and child stand together, gazing at their reflections in a mirror.](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/startright/images/credit-card-tiles3-686x386.jpg)

### **How to find out my credit score?**

Credit scores are calculated by Canada’s two major credit-reporting agencies: Equifax and TransUnion. They calculate your score based on information in your credit report. Key factors that can affect your score include your payment history, how much debt you have and how long you’ve been using credit.

[Learn more about credit score](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/advice-plus/features/posts.credit-card-newcomers-to-canada.html)

![A family of four, including two children, happily posing with their beloved dog in a scenic setting.](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/startright/images/credit-card-tiles2-686x386.jpg)

### **How can I get a credit card?**

Scotiabank offers a variety of cards from trusted brands including VISA\*, MasterCard®\*\* and American Express®^.

Book an appointment with a Scotiabank Advisor to apply for a credit card once you’re in Canada.

[Book an appointment](https://hello.scotiabank.com/book/customer-flag)

## **Looking for valuable advice?**

### **We’re here to help, ask us anything**

The _StartRight™_ team is here to support you. Call, email or book an appointment today.

[Contact us now](https://startright.scotiabank.com/ca/en/connect-with-us.html)

![Lightbulb icon](https://startright.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/tip/tip-colour.svg)

### More advice on all things Canadian

Find more personal stories, articles, and resources to help you settle in sooner.

[Read about life in Canada](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/advice-plus/features.1.new-to-canada.html)

[View Legal](https://startright.scotiabank.com/ca/en/credit-cards.html#legal)

†

Scotiabank StartRight® Program is available only for Canadian Permanent Residents from 0-5 years in Canada, International Students and Foreign Workers.

§

Subject to credit approval. To be eligible, you must be a participant in the Scotiabank _StartRight_ ® Program. To qualify for a credit card, you must be a resident of Canada and the age of majority in your province/territory where you live. Your approval for a credit card and the credit limit assigned will be determined based on Scotiabank’s credit criteria, including your verifiable income and credit history (If available). The credit limit amount of up to $15,000 under the Scotiabank _StartRight_ ® Program is subject to change by Scotiabank from time to time without prior notice. A credit history in Canada is not required in order to be eligible for a credit card under the Scotiabank _StartRight_ ® Program.

††

Subject to credit approval and other conditions. Only available for the following select countries: Australia, Austria, Dominican Republic, India, Kenya, Mexico, Nigeria, Philippines, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Switzerland, the United Kingdom, United States and Ukraine. Select countries are subject to change without notice.

®

Registered trademarks of The Bank of Nova Scotia.

™

Trademark of The Bank of Nova Scotia.

®\*\*

Mastercard, Priceless Cities and Tap & Go are registered trademarks, and the circles design and Mastercard Global Services are trademarks of Mastercard International Incorporated and used under license by The Bank of Nova Scotia.

®^

Registered trademarks of The Bank of Nova Scotia. American Express is a registered trademark of American Express. This credit card program is issued and administered by the Bank of Nova Scotia under license from American Express.

\*

Visa Int. / Licensed User.

### Is this credit card right for you?

#### **Right for you if you:**

- Want to obtain a convenient and secure payment method for everyday purchases
- Interested in building your credit history by making at least your minimum payments on time each month
- Want an interest free grace period on purchases
- Value rewards and benefits that can be earned with this Card and willing to pay an annual fee
- Meet a minimum annual income of $60,000 or a minimum household income of $100,000 or minimum assets under management of $250,000

#### **May not be right for you if you:**

- Will be carrying an outstanding balance for a long period of time or using it for debt consolidation
- Rarely travel, rarely make foreign currency purchases, or rarely need   travel insurance coverage
- Prefer cash back rewards
- Prefer not to pay an annual fee

[ContinueContinue to application](https://hello.scotiabank.com/lending/triage?productCode=VFF&subProductCode=TR&source=111J&language=en)

### Is this credit card right for you?

#### **Right for you if you:**

- Are a student enrolled in a Canadian post secondary school and this is one of your first Credit Cards

- Value the rewards and benefits that can be earned with this Card
- Want to obtain a convenient and secure payment method for everyday purchases
- Interested in building your credit history by making at least your minimum payments on time each month
- Want an interest free grace period on purchases
- Prefer to avoid annual fees

#### **May not be right for you if you:**

- Will be carrying an outstanding balance for a long period of time or using it for debt consolidation
- Have a steady income of more than $12000/year (income requirement subject to change) as you may qualify for other types of available Credit Cards
- Prefer cash back rewards
- Prefer a card with certain embedded insurance benefits

[ContinueContinue to application](https://hello.scotiabank.com/book?language=en&referrer=com&intcmp=S1iSDNT0122-002)
